title: Cobblemon Future Support
description: A datapack bringing pokemon, moves, models, and animations from future versions back to 1.20.1
body:
```
Disclaimer:
None of the textures, models, animations, or other assets were made by me. 
They were made by the immensely talented team behind the Cobblemon mod.
All I have done is put publically accessible files together with minimal modification.
```

Cobblemon Future Support is my take at legacy support for Cobblemon 1.5.2. In this datapack you will find the following.
- all 87 pokemon added in 1.6 and 1.6.1
- 108 model updates and 57 animation updates for existing pokemon
- More accurate movesets for every pokemon
- spawn and evolution conditions for Rotom
- Magikarp jump variants for both Magikarp and Gyarados.

Rotom is able to spawn near PCs, Data monitors, and in woodland mansions at night. its spawnrate increases dramatically during thunderstorms.

Rotom changes form via evolution stones. (it cannot turn back)
Thunder stone makes Rotom Fan
Ice stone makes Rotom Frost
Fire stone makes Rotom Heat
Leaf stone makes Rotom Mow
Water stone makes Rotom Wash


as we lack the shell helmet to evolve Shelmet and Karrablast, it has been replaced with an Iron Helmet
